ON STAGE. OFF STAGE. BACK STAGE. ALMOST FAMOUS. VERY FAMOUS. INFAMOUS. UPTOWN. DOWNTOWN. OUT OF TOWN. ON THE TOWN. IT BOY. IT GIRL. WEAR IT OUT. OR IN. ONLINE. OFFLINE. IN THE LINE. ALWAYS READY. NEVER WAITING. BE HEARD. MAKE NOISE. FOLLOW YOUR DREAMS. VFILES XO.
